completed_tasks.name: Rewrite TuningAddPage into 3-step animated flow (category → part type → form + specs + photos)

remaining_tasks.name: Fix 'No part types found' — Step 2 returns empty for all categories
remaining_tasks.notes: Query: SELECT id, name, display_order, notes_placeholder FROM part_types WHERE category = [cat] AND is_active = true ORDER BY display_order ASC. Returns empty for every category tested. Root cause unknown — either (a) migration 026_part_spec_domain.sql seed data wasn't run in Supabase, or (b) is_active defaults to false instead of true, or (c) FK constraint mismatch between TUNING_CATEGORIES ids and part_categories.name. Must diagnose before next session.

blockers.description: Step 2 part type picker shows 'No part types found' for every category. The part_types table either has no rows, no rows with is_active = true, or category FK values don't match TUNING_CATEGORIES ids.
blockers.workaround: Diagnose by running: SELECT id, name, category, is_active FROM part_types LIMIT 20; in Supabase SQL editor. If empty → seed data from migration 024/026 not applied. If rows exist but is_active = false → update part_types SET is_active = true. If category mismatch → check against part_categories.name.

human_actions_pending.action: Run SELECT id, name, category, is_active FROM part_types LIMIT 20 in Supabase SQL editor to diagnose empty part_types
human_actions_pending.context: Step 2 of the new TuningAddPage returns 'No part types found' for every category. Need to know if the table is empty, rows exist with is_active=false, or category values mismatch.

decisions.decision: 3-step animated slide using a 300vw strip with translateX — no extra direction state needed, reverse is inherent
decisions.rationale: Simplest CSS-only approach for directional slide: step 1=translateX(0), step 2=translateX(-33.33%), step 3=translateX(-66.67%). Back slides right automatically.

decisions.decision: Dev server must run on port 5176 — localStorage is origin-scoped
decisions.rationale: gdim_chosen_car_id is set under http://localhost:5176. Running on 5177 breaks car/mod queries silently (empty data, 'Unknown' car). Always use: npx vite --port 5176 --host

decisions.decision: boolean spec values: 'false' is not stored in job_specs (skip on save)
decisions.rationale: 'false' means user left toggle off — no meaningful data to store. Only 'true' booleans are inserted.

next_action: Diagnose part_types table in Supabase SQL editor. Run: SELECT id, name, category, is_active FROM part_types LIMIT 20. Then fix whatever is missing (empty table → run seed data; is_active=false → update; category mismatch → align with TUNING_CATEGORIES ids). After fix, verify Step 2 shows part types, then test full 3-step flow end-to-end.
context_notes: TuningAddPage is fully rewritten. Step 1 (category picker) is pixel-identical to Phase 1. Step 2 queries part_types. Step 3 has all 9 universal fields + Full Specs section + Advanced Specs accordion + photo upload with browser-image-compression EXIF stripping. Save flow: INSERT jobs → INSERT job_specs → compress+upload photos → INSERT job_photos → navigate('/tuning'). browser-image-compression installed. TypeScript clean. Dev server: npx vite --port 5176 --host. Machine IP: 192.168.3.4. The only remaining issue is Step 2 being empty due to part_types table state in Supabase.
